title: Emote Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the EZyapper Emote Plugin — semantic emote search, Discord CDN refresh, and auto-steal.

data_dir.description: Path to data directory (relative to plugin directory).

max_image_size_kb.description: Maximum image file size in KB.

allowed_formats.description: Allowed image file extensions (e.g. png, jpg, webp, gif).

api_key.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for vision analysis.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds for vision analysis.

prompt.description: Prompt used to analyze images for emote suitability.

enabled.description: Enable automatic emote stealing from message image attachments.

additional_blacklist_channels.description: Channel IDs where stealing is blocked (extends main bot blacklist).

additional_whitelist_channels.description: Channel IDs where stealing is always allowed. If set, only these channels work.

additional_blacklist_users.description: User IDs whose images are never stolen.

rate_limit_per_minute.description: Maximum steals per minute per channel.

search_emote_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for semantic emote search via LLM API.

send_emote_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds for Discord CDN refresh and message send.

model.description: Model name for semantic emote search LLM.

api_key.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for the emote LLM.

api_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL for the emote LLM.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens for emote LLM responses.

temperature.description: Temperature for emote LLM (0-2, lower is more deterministic).

token.description: Discord bot token for independent message sending (typically same as main bot).
